name: Beef Kwangton
recipeIngredient: 1 slice fresh ginger root, 1/2 inch thick
1/2 teaspoon cornstarch mixed with 1/2 teaspoon water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a wok or frying pan and add the oil.
2. Add the ginger and stir to add flavor to the oil. Discard the ginger.
3. Add the beef slices. Stir fry for about 2 minutes.
4. Add the bamboo shoots, mushrooms, snow peas, and chicken broth. Cover and cook for 2 minutes.
5. Stir in oyster sauce, soy sauce, sesame oil, and sugar. Thicken with the cornstarch mixture.
6. Serve immediately with rice.
